home.heroSubtitle: Swiss digital studio. Design, development and hosting in a monthly subscription. No setup fees, no commitment.
home.metric1Label: Average delivery time, from brief to publication
home.metric2Label: Average Lighthouse score across all our deliveries

home.trustBadge1Body: Data and site hosted in Western Switzerland. Sector compliance.
home.trustBadge2Body: Data protection in line with the 2023 Swiss federal law and the European GDPR.
home.trustBadge3Body: The source code belongs to you. No dependency, no lock-in.
home.bookingDescription: Book a slot directly on our calendar · free, no obligation. We discuss your needs and the best-suited solution.
home.bookingBenefit1: 15 minutes by phone · or video call on request
home.bookingBenefit2: Clear answer on feasibility and timeline
home.bookingBenefit3: Quote within 48 h after the call if you wish to proceed
home.ctaFinalBody: A few questions to frame your project. We'll get back to you within 24 working hours.

about.manifestoP1: The web market in Switzerland lacks transparency. Quotes at CHF 15,000 for sites built on generic templates, months of waiting for features deliverable in days, services billed without clear visibility on what is actually produced.
about.manifestoP2: Tourbillon Studios was founded to offer an alternative. Our conviction: a website is a commercial tool, not a work of art. It must be delivered quickly, convert visitors into clients, and represent a justified investment.
about.manifestoP3: Our commitment: 48 hours between quote signing and going live. A single monthly price, no setup fees, no fixed term. If we miss the deadline, your first month is free.
about.valuesTitle: Four principles that guide every project.
about.behindCodeDescription: Our production workshop · equipment, tools and working environment.

process.heroSubtitle: Four structured steps, a contractually guaranteed deadline, one month free if we overrun.
process.step1Description: Scoping video call. We define your goals, your audience, the available content and existing visual identity. You leave with a written summary and a precise plan.
process.step2Description: Architecture, design and integration. You follow progress live on a private URL. No intermediate meetings: we build, you watch.
process.step3Description: You receive the final URL. You test on your devices, browsers, with your content. Approval or list of tweaks to make.
process.step4Description: One week to refine what needs refining: copy, colors, structure. All tweaks are included in the subscription, with no limit.
process.guaranteeTitle: Missed deadline? The first month is free.
process.guaranteeBody: We meet this deadline on 99 % of our Starter and Pro projects. When we don't, the commitment stands: the first month is free, with no conditions.
process.faqQ1: What happens if my content isn't ready?
process.faqA1: We can draft the copy for you, optionally. Failing that, we use placeholder content that we replace during the tweaks period. The 48-hour guarantee only applies if essential content is provided at the brief.
process.faqA2: Custom projects (web app, advanced e-commerce) naturally go beyond the 48-hour scope. We communicate a tailored timeline after the brief, typically one to four weeks.
process.faqQ3: What happens during the 36 hours of build?
process.faqA3: The team builds. You access the private URL and follow construction section by section. No intermediate slides, no wireframes in meetings: code shipped from the first hour.
process.faqA4: During the tweaks week, yes. During the 36-hour build, no · that's the condition to hit the deadline. The brief remains the decisive moment.

pricing.heroSubtitle: No setup fees. Cancel anytime. The source code belongs to you.
pricing.vatNote: Excl. Swiss VAT. Minimum term one month.
pricing.ownershipBody: Whatever plan you choose, on cancellation we provide a complete archive of the source code. You remain free to host it elsewhere or hand maintenance to another provider.
pricing.roiBody: A quick simulation to visualise what a site converting at +34 % can generate for your business.
pricing.roiResultNote: Estimate based on an average +34 % improvement in conversion rate observed across our projects.
pricing.comparisonHeading: Everything that's included, plan by plan.

starter.description: Professional showcase website delivered in 48 hours. All services are included in the monthly subscription.

pro.tagline: The plan most chosen by Swiss SMEs.
pro.description: Professional showcase website with blog, local SEO, multilingual and simplified content management. All services included in the monthly subscription.
pro.feature1: Showcase site up to 15 pages + blog

custom.tagline: Web application, e-commerce or specific needs.
custom.description: All Pro plan features, plus custom development, advanced integrations, managed database and dedicated support. Tailored quote after discovery call.

faq.a1: Yes, no commitment. You can cancel at any time with 30 days notice.
faq.q2: Does the source code belong to me?
faq.a2: Absolutely. You own all the code. You can take it, modify it, migrate it at any time.
faq.a3: Automatic monthly subscription. No long-term contract, no hidden fees. You pay the same amount every month.
faq.q4: What if you miss the 48 hours?
faq.a4: We offer you 1 free month of subscription per day of delay. We keep our promises.
faq.a5: Yes, no penalty. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time, prorated.
faq.a6: No, no setup or installation fees. The quote includes everything except your existing domain if applicable.

recommender.title: Which plan suits you?
recommender.rationaleWebapp: A custom web application needs specific features (authentication, integrations, database) that only the Custom plan covers.
recommender.rationaleEcommerceSmall: A shop with a small catalogue fits comfortably in the Pro plan, which includes basic e-commerce, multilingual and local SEO.
recommender.rationaleEcommerceLarge: For an e-commerce with a substantial catalogue, the Custom plan provides the managed database, API integrations and priority support.
recommender.rationaleVitrineSmall: For a simple showcase site up to 5 pages, the Starter plan covers the essentials: fast delivery, hosting, basic SEO.
recommender.rationaleVitrineMedium: For a fuller showcase site with blog, multilingual and advanced SEO/GEO, the Pro plan is the most suitable solution.
recommender.rationaleVitrineLarge: For a showcase site with more than 15 pages or specific needs, the Custom plan offers the required flexibility.

work.heroSubtitle: A selection of cases for which our clients measured a concrete return in less than 90 days.

alex.bio: Six years of experience in agency and SaaS environments. Specialised in product design and conversion strategy.

claude.name: Claude
claude.bio: Autonomous intelligent agent in charge of the daily writing and publication of the editorial journal, optimised for SEO and GEO.

speed.title: Speed
speed.body: 48 hours to deliver a professional site. Time is your rarest asset. Our method is calibrated to preserve it.

precision.title: Swiss precision
precision.body: Careful work, FADP compliance, hosting in Switzerland. Attention to detail as a standard, not an exception.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.body: Public pricing, detailed quotes, no hidden costs. You know what you invest and what you receive, from the first visit.

performance.title: Performance
performance.body: Lighthouse 95+, measured conversion, integrated SEO and GEO. A beautiful site that doesn't convert is a cost, not an asset.

concierge.title: Luxury concierge in Geneva
concierge.excerpt: Editorial showcase site for a high-end concierge service. Complete redesign with editorial design and integrated booking system.
concierge.story: A luxury concierge based in Geneva wanted to modernise their website to reflect the high-end positioning of their services.
concierge.challenge: Rebuild an editorial site that highlights the quality of service, without falling into luxury cliché.
concierge.solution: Sober editorial design, careful photography, lean user journey. Integrated booking system. Site delivered in 48 hours.

fashion.title: Contemporary fashion e-commerce
fashion.excerpt: Custom e-commerce platform for a women's fashion brand. Catalogue, international payments, multilingual management.
fashion.story: A contemporary fashion brand based in Lausanne was launching their first online collection.
fashion.challenge: Build a custom e-commerce rather than a standard Shopify. Maximum performance, smooth shopping experience.
fashion.solution: Modern stack, Stripe payments, multilingual management EN/FR/DE/IT. Delivered in fifteen days, Custom plan.

restaurant.title: Restaurant and events
restaurant.excerpt: Immersive showcase site for an event restaurant in Milan.
restaurant.story: An event restaurant in Milan wanted a site reflecting the unique atmosphere of the venue.
restaurant.challenge: Capture the strong visual identity of the venue in a website.
restaurant.solution: Editorial art direction, professional photography, multilingual IT/EN/FR. Integrated booking system. Delivered in 48 hours.
